name: code-search
description: Fast CLI search across modalities: lexical (rg/fd), structural (ast-grep/semgrep), code-intelligence (LSP/global/ctags), structured-data (jq/yq/gron), history (git pickaxe), structured rewrite (comby), data files (duckdb), metrics (tokei/scc), and non-code docs (rga/pandoc/pdftotext).
